architecture_decisions.decision: Add context.WithTimeout wrapper to all database operations in handlers
architecture_decisions.rationale: Prevents indefinite blocking on database queries; 30-second default timeout allows operations to complete while catching deadlocks or slow queries early

architecture_decisions.decision: Create DB query middleware with execution time logging
architecture_decisions.rationale: Enables diagnosis of slow queries; execution time tracking helps identify N+1 problems or missing indexes

architecture_decisions.decision: Add configurable connection pool settings for tests
architecture_decisions.rationale: Tests can exhaust connection pools; separate pool config for tests prevents resource contention between test cleanup and test execution

architecture_decisions.decision: Implement t.Cleanup for guaranteed test resource cleanup
architecture_decisions.rationale: Even if test fails, cleanup runs; prevents state leakage between tests that could cause timeouts

architecture_decisions.decision: Add health check middleware for test database setup
architecture_decisions.rationale: Verifies database is ready before running tests; prevents timeouts from stale connections or unresponsive database

backend_tasks.purpose: Centralized timeout configuration for all database operations
Add timeout contexts to all repository methods and query logging
Wrap handler database calls with timeout contexts
Add health check function and improve connection pool config for tests
Add t.Cleanup, health checks, and improved test isolation
Add query metrics middleware for production observability

database_migrations.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_compliance_controls_framework_status ON compliance_controls(framework, status); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_log_created_at ON audit_log(created_at DESC); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_log_user_id ON audit_log(user_id);

e2e_tests.name: TestDatabaseConnectionPoolExhaustion
steps: Create connection pool with max 2 connections
Verify all connections released after timeout

e2e_tests.name: TestPaginationUnderLoad
steps: Verify all responses complete within timeout

security_notes: Context timeouts should not bypass authorization checks
Query logging must sanitize sensitive data ( passwords, tokens )
Health check endpoint should not expose database structure
docker_changes: Add DB_QUERY_TIMEOUT_MS environment variable to compliance-service
Add DB_POOL_MAX_CONNS and DB_POOL_MIN_CONNS environment variables
market_driven_features: One-click compliance report generation - existing in GenerateReport, add frontend UI endpoint
99.99% uptime SLA - health check monitoring supports this requirement
Secure print release mobile app - audit logging tracks release events for compliance
